S.n: Heading & Text Set the Typographic Hierarchy

B.x: BLOCKS: HEADING · TEXT · BADGE
Heading & Text Set the Typographic Hierarchy
The heading block controls size (sm → 4xl), weight, and color — anchoring every slide. Text blocks carry body copy with full color and size control. Badge blocks surface labels with icons inline.

S.n: Quote & Callout Frame the Message That Must Land

B.x: BLOCKS: QUOTE · CALLOUT · DIVIDER
Quote & Callout Frame the Message That Must Land
Great presentations don't just inform — they persuade, inspire, and move audiences to act with clarity and conviction.
B.author: Vela Design Principle

B.x: Use callout blocks to surface warnings, tips, or non-negotiable information that audiences must not miss during live delivery.

Bullets, Icon-Row & Tag-Group Organize Any List

I: Bullet blocks render clean, scannable lists with consistent visual spacing
Each item supports full text content with color and size inheritance
Ideal for feature lists, acceptance criteria, and executive summaries

S.n: SVG, Spacer & Divider Control Visual Rhythm

B.x: BLOCKS: SVG · SPACER · DIVIDER
SVG, Spacer & Divider Control Visual Rhythm
SVG blocks embed raw vector graphics inline with full color control. Spacers add precise vertical rhythm between blocks. Dividers create hard visual section breaks.
